Developmental and Behavioral Screening Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are developmental and behavioral screening tests? 
Developmental and behavioral screening tests look at how your child is developing. The screenings are made up of checklists and questionnaires for parents. They include questions about your child's language, movement, th
